ai_payload.profile_intro: Interdisciplinary professional with a BA in International Development and pedagogical authorization, combining teaching, counseling, and foundational IT skills. Based in Frankfurt am Main with EU work eligibility. Completed multiple IT coursework modules including Python, Java, and computer security.
profile_highlights: Python and foundational Java programming knowledge from university coursework
Teaching and classroom management experience across multiple educational settings
Strong communication and intercultural skills developed through multilingual work and study

skill_boxes.heading: Programming & Development
skill_boxes.content: Python, Java, JavaScript, SQL, Git, Flutter/Dart

skill_boxes.heading: IT & Technical Skills
skill_boxes.content: Object-Oriented Programming, Computer Security, Technical Communication, API Development

skill_boxes.heading: Education & Training
skill_boxes.content: Teaching, Classroom Management, Career Counseling, Language Instruction

ai_payload.interests: Programming, education technology, intercultural communication, language learning
